description: Phase 1 evals — 90-day-plan mode end-to-end. Covers draft happy paths (workspace prereq, fresh, swot-only, full-pipeline), idempotence, review render, layered challenge (completeness → quality → consistency → /present handoff), refusal-contract delegation to onboard-guard, graceful upstream degradation, conflicting evidence, doc-state errors. All evals tag 'mode:90-day-plan' in summary for Phase 2 RFC regression filtering.

evals.name: workspace-missing-refusal
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Prereq refusal: ~/repos/onboard-<org>/ absent → skill refuses with /onboard-first message.

assertions.description: refusal message names the missing workspace and points at /onboard

evals.name: draft-fresh-workspace
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Empty onboard scaffold; --mode=draft emits 7-section skeleton with [TODO] in all sections.

evals.name: draft-with-swot-only
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. SWOT entity populated; stakeholder/arch/notes empty. §1-3 partial; §5/§6 still [TODO].

assertions.description: SWOT entity content reflected in synthesis

evals.name: draft-full-pipeline
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. All four sources populated. §1-3 substantially filled with multi-source citations; §4 has hunch with confirm/refute; §5/§6 [TODO].

evals.name: draft-idempotent
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Re-run --mode=draft preserves outside-fence user prose; refreshes inside-fence content.

assertions.pattern: USER PROSE: This is my own synthesis paragraph
assertions.description: user prose below closing fence preserved verbatim

assertions.pattern: Old auto bullet — should be replaced on re-run

evals.name: review-mode-readonly
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. --mode=review renders sections; no mutation; no checks.

assertions.description: review mode does not run challenge checks

evals.name: challenge-layer-1-fail
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Doc with [TODO] markers fails layer 1; layer 2/3 not run.

evals.name: challenge-layer-2-fail-vague-asks
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Layer 1 clean, §5 has 'more headcount' (no number/date) → layer 2 fails on ask-specificity.

evals.name: challenge-layer-3-pass-handoff
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. All 3 layers clean → /present handoff offered.

evals.name: refusal-raw-notes
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Path under notes/raw/ → refusal-contract honored via onboard-guard delegation.

evals.name: memory-mcp-unavailable
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Memory MCP unavailable → graceful filesystem-only fallback; no abort.
evals.prompt: /strategy-doc fresh-workspace --mode=draft  (fixture: tests/fixtures/strategy-doc/fresh-workspace/ — no memory-seed.json, simulating both 'MCP unavailable' and 'entity missing' indistinguishably; eval asserts skill does not abort)

evals.name: conflicting-evidence-blocks-challenge
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. SWOT-strength vs notes-weakness → [CONFLICT: ...] inline marker; challenge layer 1 fails on CONFLICT.

evals.name: doc-fence-malformed-refuses-mutation
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Doc with unclosed/nested fences → skill refuses mutation, emits damage report.

evals.name: multi-day-overlap-mutates-existing
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Existing doc dated 2 weeks ago → --mode=draft mutates same file (does NOT create new dated file).

assertions.description: existing dated filename referenced as mutation target
no new dated file created today

evals.name: multi-file-glob-refusal
evals.summary: tag: mode:90-day-plan. Two *-90-day-plan.md files present → refuse mutation, ask user to consolidate.
